text:
[
  {
    "thinking": "The user begins the segment by scrolling down the 'Explore' page to browse through the available research opportunities. This is a continuous action as they review the list.",
    "type": "scroll",
    "time_start_ms": 0,
    "time_end_ms": 15900,
    "description": "User scrolls down the Explore page to view more task opportunities.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "The Explore page of the app showing various task cards like 'Video Call', 'In Person', and 'Diary Study'."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user moves the cursor to the top right of the screen and clicks on the filter icon to refine the list of opportunities.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 15900,
    "time_end_ms": 15900,
    "description": "User clicks on the filter icon in the top right corner.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "Filter icon",
    "frame_description": "Explore page with the cursor positioned over the filter icon in the top right header."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Immediately after clicking the filter icon, a modal sheet titled 'Filter Opportunities' slides up from the bottom of the screen, presenting various filtering options.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 16050,
    "time_end_ms": 16300,
    "description": "The 'Filter Opportunities' modal appears.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "A bottom sheet modal titled 'Filter Opportunities' has appeared over the Explore page, showing options for Task Type, Duration, and Pay Rate."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "After spending some time on the filter screen, the user clicks the primary action button at the bottom to apply their selections.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 31200,
    "time_end_ms": 31200,
    "description": "User clicks the 'Apply Filters' button.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "Apply Filters",
    "frame_description": "The Filter Opportunities modal with the cursor clicking the blue 'Apply Filters' button at the bottom."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Upon clicking 'Apply Filters', the modal sheet slides back down and disappears, returning the user to the main Explore page.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 31350,
    "time_end_ms": 31600,
    "description": "The 'Filter Opportunities' modal closes.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "The filter modal is no longer visible, and the Explore page is shown again."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user resumes scrolling down the Explore page, likely to see how the applied filters have changed the list of opportunities.",
    "type": "scroll",
    "time_start_ms": 31600,
    "time_end_ms": 58700,
    "description": "User scrolls down the Explore page to view filtered opportunities.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "The Explore page showing task cards, with the user scrolling downwards."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The app interface is suddenly replaced by a dark screen with a message, indicating the end of the interactive task portion of the session.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 58700,
    "time_end_ms": 58750,
    "description": "A screen appears thanking the user and asking them to close the website task.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "A dark overlay screen with the text 'Perfect, thank you. Please close the website task and we'll continue our conversation.' and an 'Open' button."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The video feed switches from the screen recording of the mobile app to a direct webcam view of the participant.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 60500,
    "time_end_ms": 60550,
    "description": "The view switches to the participant's webcam.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "Webcam view of the female participant in an indoor setting."
  }
